case_title: MCCASEY, KATHLEEN E. VS WEAKLAND, PAUL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCASEY, KATHLEEN E. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WEAKLAND, PAUL PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ESTABLISH GOOD CAUSE FOR HER FAILURE TO ATTEND ARBITRATION OR PARTICIPATE VIA TELEPHONE AFTER HAVING ARRANGED TO TESTIFY VIA TELEPHONE, WAS REACHED BY TELEPHONE DURING HEARING BUT DID NOT PARTICIPATE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THERE IS NO MONEY JUDGMENT ON THE MARCH 23, 2004 JUDGMENT. ALL ENTRIES ARE DONE IN REMARKS.
ANY ADJUDICATION OF THE ORDER TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION SHOULD BE DONE BY REMARKS ONLY.
FOLDER IN MELINDA'S DESK. DON'T TAKE FOLDER WITHOUT LEAVING A NOTE. THANKS, FANNY
PLAINTIFF MCCASEY'S REQUEST TO CONTINUE OEX, DENIED.
FEE WAIVER ORDER ATTACHED TO THE OEX.
COPY OF ATTY-CLIENT FEE DISPUTE, ADVISORY ARBITRA- TION; NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMT; COURT OF APPEAL CASE #104837 ETEC FILED ONLY.
OEX DISCHARGED. PROOF OF PAYMENT OF $3500 PROVIDED TO THE COURT BY DEFT PAUL WEAKLAND.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
$3,500 CASHIER'S CHECK SENT BY PLTF VIA FEDEX TO DEFT ON 6/16/04. OEX WILL BE DISCHARGED ON 7/8/04 IF PLTF MCCASEY SUBMITS PROOF OF RECEIPT OF
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY MCCASEY, KATHLEEN E. AS TO DEFENDANT WEAKLAND, PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-2004 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WEAKLAND, PAUL
AWARD CONFIRMED AS MADE BY THE ARBITRATORS.
CASHIER'S CHECK BY DEFT, WEAKLAND PAUL
ATTY-CLIENT FEE DISPUTE FILED BY DEFT AFTER THE HEARING. SUBMITTED TO COURT.
ORDER TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION FILED UPON THE INSISTENCE OF DEFT PAUL WEAKLAND. THE COMPUTER WILL NOT ACCEPT THE FILING BECAUSE
DEFT FILED A FEE WAIVER FOR THE ORDER TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION FEE OF $36.30.
2ND CORRECTION TO JUDGMENT: PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY DEFENDANT DISPUTED FEES AND COSTS OF $3500.00 PER COMM. MARK MURRAY
REMARKS IS REGARDING 2ND CORRECTION OF THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMT ENTERED ON 3/23/04 MAILED 4/30/04. AWARD OF $3500 NO COSTS.
OEX CONTINUED TO 17-JUN-04 AT 11:00 AM IN ROOM 506 AS TO: MCCASEY, KATHLEEN E.
ATTY-CLIENT FEE DISPUTE -- AWARDED TO DEFT. PAUL WEAKLAND THE SUM OF $3500.00 AND NO COSTS. SEE ATTACHMENT OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMT IN FOLDER.
JUDGEMENT FOR MOTION TO TAX COST - JUDGMENT ORDERED FOR DEFT WEAKLAND AND AGAINST PLTF MCCASEY FOR $1,000.00.
COPIES OF JUDGMENT ON MOTION TO TAX COST AND ORDER TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION, MAILED TO PARTIES.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED FOR 13-MAY-04 AT 11:00 AM IN ROOM 506 AS TO: MCCASEY, KATHLEEN E.
JUDGMENT OF 3/23/04 CORRECTED TO ADD: TRIAL AFTER ARBITRATION DENIED BECAUSE PLTF WILLFULLY FAILED TO APPEAR AT THE ARBITRATION HEARING. ARBITRATION
PROOF OF DUE DILIGENCE ON ORDER TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION, FILED.
MOTION TO TAX COSTS FILED BY DEFT WEAKLAND. NOTICE SENT TO PLFT MCCASEY. COURT DATE JUNE 17, 2004 AT 11:00AM RM 506. RE:ORDER TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION
FAXED CORREPONDENCE REC'D FROM PLFT KATHLEEN E. MCCASEY.
ORDER TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION CONTINUED TO JULY 8, 2004 AT 11:00AM RM 506.
